label: Seasonal Gutter Cleaning
description: Creates a maintenance task for each property every month so gutters are cleaned before winter and after autumn leaf-fall.
hint: No configurable parameters — toggle on/off only.
script:
name: "Seasonal Gutter Cleaning"
description: >
  Creates a monthly maintenance task for each property reminding the manager
  to arrange gutter cleaning and assign a landscaper.

schedule:
  interval: monthly

scope:
  resource: property

actions:
  - type: create_task
    subject: "Gutter cleaning due: {{property.address_line1}}"
    category: maintenance
    urgency: low
    require_vendor_type: Landscaper
    body: >
      Gutters at {{property.address_line1}} are due for their monthly cleaning.
      Assign a landscaper and schedule the service to prevent water damage
      and ice dams during the colder months.
